sections.paragraph:
Original: בּקק

Transliteration: bâqaq

Phonetic: baw-kah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to empty
    1. (Qal)
      1. to empty, lay waste
      2. to make void (figuratively)
    2. (Niphal) to be emptied
    3. (Polel) to empty out, devastate

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 273

Part(s) of speech: Verb
